ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider of the patient */,
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Brief medical history of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the emergency contact to the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_address" TEXT /* Address of the emergency contact */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the patient */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient the record belongs to */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "chest_pain_type" TEXT /* Type of chest pain (e.g., Typical Angina, Atypical Angina, Non-Anginal Pain, Asymptomatic) */,
  "resting_blood_pressure" INTEGER /* Resting blood pressure (in mm Hg) */,
  "cholesterol" INTEGER /* Serum cholesterol (in mg/dl) */,
  "fasting_blood_sugar" TEXT /* Fasting blood sugar (1 = > 120 mg/dl, 0 = <= 120 mg/dl) */,
  "resting_ecg" TEXT /* Resting electrocardiographic results (0 = Normal, 1 = Having ST-T wave abnormality, 2 = Showing probable or definite left ventricular hypertrophy by Estes' criteria) */,
  "max_heart_rate" INTEGER /* Maximum heart rate achieved */,
  "exercise_induced_angina" TEXT /* Exercise-induced angina (1 = Yes, 0 = No) */,
  "st_depression" REAL /* ST depression induced by exercise relative to rest */,
  "st_slope" TEXT /* The slope of the peak exercise ST segment (1 = Upsloping, 2 = Flat, 3 = Downsloping) */,
  "major_vessels" INTEGER /* Number of major vessels colored by flourosopy (0-3) */,
  "thalassemia" TEXT /* Thalassemia (3 = Normal, 6 = Fixed Defect, 7 = Reversible Defect) */,
  "heart_disease" TEXT /* Presence of heart disease (1 = Yes, 0 = No) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the patient (in cm) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the patient (in kg) */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the patient */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies of the patient */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the patient (e.g., Non-Smoker, Current Smoker, Former Smoker) */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption of the patient (e.g., Non-Drinker, Light Drinker, Heavy Drinker) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient the diagnosis belongs to */,
  "diagnosis_code" TEXT /* Code of the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_name" TEXT /* Name of the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date the diagnosis was made */,
  "diagnosed_by" TEXT /* Doctor who made the diagnosis */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms reported by the patient */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes by the diagnosing doctor */,
  "follow_up_required" TEXT /* Indicates if follow-up is required (e.g., Yes, No) */,
  "referred_to" TEXT /* Indicates if the patient was referred to another specialist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment plan */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient the plan belongs to */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment plan */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment plan */,
  "prescribed_by" TEXT /* Doctor who prescribed the treatment plan */,
  "goals" TEXT /* Goals of the treatment plan */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes by the prescribing doctor */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the next follow-up */,
  "compliance" TEXT /* Patient's compliance with the treatment plan (e.g., Good, Fair, Poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient the medication belongs to */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the medication (e.g., daily, twice a week) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the medication */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the medication */,
  "prescribed_by" TEXT /* Doctor who prescribed the medication */,
  "refills" INTEGER /* Number of refills allowed */,
  "pharmacy" TEXT /* Pharmacy where the medication was prescribed */,
  "prescription_date" TEXT /* Date the prescription was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient scheduled for the appointment */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the doctor conducting the appointment */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "appointment_type" TEXT /* Type of the appointment (e.g., Consultation, Follow-Up, Emergency) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., Scheduled, Completed, Canceled) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the appointment (e.g., clinic, hospital) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes by the doctor or patient */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the appointment (e.g., 30 minutes, 1 hour) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the doctor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the doctor */,
  "speciality" TEXT /* Speciality of the doctor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the doctor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the doctor */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Medical license number of the doctor */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "clinical_interests" TEXT /* Clinical interests or specializations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
